description: Generate traffic demand using JTRRouter on the Bologna Pasubio network located at `~/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/pasubio_buslanes.net.xml`. Identify a junction with at least one incoming edge and two valid outgoing edges to define a traffic flow of 600 vehicles per hour from time 0 to 3600. Save the flow definitions to `~/SUMO_Output/flows.xml` and the turning probabilities (summing to 1.0) to `~/SUMO_Output/turns.xml`. Use JTRRouter to generate a route file at `~/SUMO_Output/jtr_routes.rou.xml`, ensuring routes reaching the network boundary are accepted. Create a simulation configuration at `~/SUMO_Output/jtr.sumocfg` that utilizes these routes and the original network to produce a trip information file at `~/SUMO_Output/jtr_tripinfo.xml`. Execute the simulation to generate the final output.
